title: InsertName Utility
description: A client-side utility modpack optimised for mutiplayer gameplay, packed with QOL and performance boosting mods
body:
# InsertName Utility
InsertName Utility is a small modpack that includes QOL mods including, but not limited to [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat), [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) and [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) together with mods which improve the game's performance, like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) and [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium). It's useful for improving your game experience in a lot of ways while still staying close to the vanilla game.

## FAQ
### Which mods are included?
You have an entire list of the included mods in the dependencies section of the [versions](https://modrinth.com/modpack/insertname/versions) page
### I'm getting issues with the modpack, what do I do?
You can simply contact me using the "Contact" page, I will try and help you
### I have an idea for a mod that you should add to the modpack
Just contact me using one of the options on the "Contact" page and I'll consider your suggestion.

## Installation
To install this modpack, there are a few options. The preferred one being
### Using a third party launcher
To install this modpack, I recommend using the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or other launchers like [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/) or [MultiMC](https://multimc.org/) as they allow an easy installation of the modpack. A guide on how to install these can be found here: [Prism Launcher Documentation](https://prismlauncher.org/wiki/getting-started/), [MultiMC Downloads Page](https://multimc.org/#Download)
After you've downloaded the launcher and finished the installation process (including adding your Minecraft account), follow one of the instructions below:

<details>
<summary>Modrinth App</summary>

So first after you've installed the app, you need to click on the search icon
![image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ee0def9dc0407807174c0eb48aa8c68450e31f5.png)

Then you need to search for the name "InsertName" and press on install
![image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bd863bb1dcaa8dcfb07851107a2d3560cae1e12.png)

After you've selected the previously downloaded pack, you'd need to wait until it has installed all of the dependencies

![image 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe77e8cf866fd33eadbc34f6e011a036028f0b86.png)

And then press on "Play" as seen on one of those images

![image 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9092f0c982d2d269625e6e624c92d5236cf833.png)
![image 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d9831c13c13f8c2c579d9b57e5600d9e064f1b8.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Prism Launcher</summary>

After you've installed Prism Launcher, you're greeted with the menu below. Press the button "Add Instance"

![image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8865b8ab940594001c7e04b10ce763926f04bcac.png)

Then select the menu "Modrinth" and search for the term "insertname". This will show you the modpack. Just select it, select the latest version in the bottom-right corner (as it is per default) and press on "OK".

![image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4afb03dc3c465a34e1cb6fb6b3c75d6a57bc34d.png)

After that, it will download all of the dependencies

![image 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34417351e511cc9a01225274cdfadf61a985ade8.png)

And finally, press on "Launch" to launch the game

![image 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1501b47416bf37dd85e3f3bb2e9d825540f0a962.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Other launchers that support importing modpacks</summary>
If you want to use another launcher that supports downloading modpacks from Modrinth, follow the steps from Prism, you'll just have a different GUI. 
If the launcher you're using doesn't have that option, instead it has an option to import (Modrinth) modpacks, just import the .mrpack file from the releases folder as a modpack.
</details>

## Contact
You can contact me through Discord (preferred), but also via E-Mail (dannyx@dannyx.de)
